name: chave-mestra-iluminista
description: PROACTIVELY activate for: 1. User asks for any visual output — landing page, post, slide, dashboard, UI, infographic, diagram, PDF, or any HTML/CSS; 2. User wants to apply a visual style, create a brand theme, or format content visually; 3. User sends a screenshot, image, or URL and asks to replicate, clone, or analyze the visual style (engenharia reversa); 4. User asks to open a preview, see what was generated, or iterate on a design; 5. User mentions a client or external project that needs visual identity — create custom theme via Motor de Temas; 6. User asks about design, aesthetics, typography, colors, glassmorphism, or any visual concept; 7. User says 'Pergaminho Preto/Branco/Dourado', 'aplica a estética', 'cria tema pra minha marca', 'replica esse estilo', 'abre o preview', 'UI do app', or 'diagrama visual'.
